heading: Degree on graduation
label: 8467 Degree on graduation
text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy, the Superintendent of the Naval Academy may confer the degree of bachelor of science upon graduates of the Academy.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6967(less last sentence).34 U.S.C. 1057a, (less last sentence); , ; , ; , .May 25, 1933, ch. 3748 Stat. 73Aug. 9, 1946, ch. 93260 Stat. 968Aug. 4, 1949, ch. 393, § 1363 Stat. 559Aug. 18, 1949, ch. 47663 Stat. 614The word “regulations” is substituted for the words “such rules and regulations”. Since the Naval Academy is now accredited, the words “from and after the date of accrediting of said Academy” are omitted as executed.
Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 6967 of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Degrees for Persons Who Graduated Before Accrediting of Naval Academy, , provided in part that, under conditions prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy, the Superintendent of the United States Naval Academy “may confer the degree of bachelor of science upon living graduates of [the] Academy who were graduated before the date of accrediting of [the] Academy and who have met the requirements of [the] Academy for that degree.”Act Aug. 10, 1956, ch. 1041, § 3570A Stat. 634
